idea-plugin.name: Ayu Islands
idea-plugin.description:
Ayu colors, reimagined for modern JetBrains IDEs. Warm, refined palettes purpose-built for Islands UI with deep IDE integration that goes beyond simple color mapping.

What makes this different

  • 6 variants covering all lighting preferences — Mirage, Dark, and Light, each in Classic UI and Islands UI
  • 500+ UI properties hand-tuned per variant (not auto-generated from a base)
  • Native Islands UI support with rounded panels, island gaps, and compact mode
  • 30+ language syntaxes individually crafted — Java, Kotlin, Scala, C#/.NET, Rust, Go, Python, JS/TS, Ruby, PHP, Dart, Swift, HCL/Terraform, HTML/CSS, SQL, Bash, YAML, JSON, XML, Markdown, and more
  • Built on the official ayu-colors palette — faithful to the original

Free — a complete theme, not a teaser

  • All six themes with full syntax highlighting
  • VCS/diff integration with a 16-color terminal palette
  • Ten accent color presets with per-variant storage and live preview
  • Islands UI plus Classic UI support

Premium — optional extras for deeper customization

  • Per-element accent controls — tabs, scrollbars, links, caret row, inlay hints, and more
  • Neon glow effects — island borders, active tabs, and focused inputs with three glow styles (Soft, Sharp Neon, Pulse)
  • Indent Rainbow integration — accent-colored indent guides with intensity presets
  • Conflict detection — automatic override for third-party plugin conflicts (Atom Material Icons, CodeGlance Pro)

Settings: Appearance > Ayu Islands. Verified on IntelliJ IDEA, PyCharm, WebStorm, GoLand, RustRover, Rider, PhpStorm, CLion, DataGrip, RubyMine.

Color palette: ayu-theme (MIT) by dempfi. Ayu Islands adds deep JetBrains integration, Islands UI support, and premium customization tools.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
2.1.3

  • [Free] Improve Light theme surface colors for better contrast (separators, hover, folded text)
  • [Paid] Glow now renders on floating (detached) tool windows with dock↔float re-attachment

2.1.2

  • [Free] Reintroduce non-Islands (Classic UI) theme variants for Mirage, Dark, and Light
  • [Free] Settings controls adapt to an active theme type (Islands UI vs. Classic)
  • [Free] Updated plugin description with a clearer feature breakdown
  • [Paid] Glow overlay now renders below a tab strip for visual harmony with underline
  • [Paid] Tab underline thickness and glow-sync controls for Classic UI

2.1.1

  • [Paid] Add the "Highlight indent errors" toggle for Indent Rainbow — disable to blend continuation lines into gradient
  • [Paid] Fix write-unsafe EDT context error on startup with Indent Rainbow

2.1.0

  • [Paid] Indent Rainbow integration: accent-colored indent guides with four intensity presets
  • [Paid] Bracket scope gutter highlight for matched braces
  • [Free] Accent-colored matched bracket styling
  • [Free] New Integrations settings panel for third-party plugin sync

2.0.1

  • Fix crash on theme switch (null attributes in an editor scheme revert)
  • Fix crash on the theme switch (premature repaint before the new theme loaded)
  • Replace deprecated platform API calls for Marketplace compatibility

2.0.0

  • Accent color customization: 10 Ayu palette presets with per-element toggles and visual preview (premium)
  • Neon glow effects: island borders, active tabs, and focused inputs with three glow styles (premium)
  • Per-variant accent storage (independent colors for Mirage, Dark, Light)
  • Third-party conflict detection (Atom Material Icons, CodeGlance Pro)
  • Settings panel under Appearance with tabbed Accent/Effects layout
  • Freemium licensing: all six base themes remain free

1.2.1

  • Add a missing Marketplace changelog for v1.2.0 changes

1.2.0

  • Accent-colored active tab underline, caret, and focus borders for all variants
  • Accent color defaults for editor selections, search highlights, and breadcrumbs
  • Kotlin 2.1.10 JVM toolchain build support

1.1.0

  • C#/.NET syntax highlighting (Rider/ReSharper) for all three variants
  • Dart, Ruby, PHP, Scala, Kotlin, Rust, Bash, SQL, RegExp language-specific highlights
  • 20+ languages with hand-tuned syntax tokens

1.0.3

  • Ayu Dark and Ayu Light variants with canonical ayu-colors palettes
  • Six theme variants total: Mirage, Dark, Light (base + Islands UI each)
  • Git Log contrast and notification border fixes

1.0.0

  • Initial release — Ayu Mirage Islands dark theme
  • Editor color scheme with HCL, Go, Python, JS/TS, Markdown, YAML, JSON support
